## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint:boundaries`
- [ ] Fixture or emulator validation, if applicable

## Public Interface Impact

- [ ] No public interface changes
- [ ] Updated relevant docs for any `core`, `plugin-sdk`, CLI, or config changes

## Notes

Link issues, ADRs, or follow-up work.
